description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have a Debug build type and trigger multiple jobs: build-ubuntu-gcc, build-ubuntu-clang, build-macos, build-windows, samples-windows, and samples-macos. Each job should check out the repository, configure CMake with specific flags, build, and test. The build and test commands should vary depending on the job and environment.
